name: Retail Express by Maropost Release Notes Overview
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Welcome to the Release Notes section for Retail Express."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this area, you’ll find all product updates — sorted by the year they were released. From new features and enhancements to bug fixes and performance improvements, each release note provides a detailed summary of what’s changed across the Retail Express platform."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Use the links below to explore updates from specific years:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2000-2025-release-overview","children":[{"text":"2025 Release","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2001-2024-release-overview","children":[{"text":"2024 Release","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2002-2023-release-overview","children":[{"text":"2023 Release","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2003-2022-release-overview","children":[{"text":"2022 Release","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2004-2021-release-overview","children":[{"text":"2021 Release","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2005-2020-before-release-overview","children":[{"text":"2020 and Before Release ","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Click into each section to view the highlights and full details from that year’s updates."}]}]
